SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.safety.hazid

Class StidHazopDataSource

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.hazid.StidHazopDataSource
public class StidHazopDataSource extends Object
Normalized STID and P&ID-to-HAZOP JSON bridge that builds HAZOPTemplate nodes from externally normalized evidence.

This class does not connect to STID, document-management systems, or P&ID tools directly. Those systems should normalize their tag, node, and worksheet evidence into JSON and pass it to this deterministic Java adapter so the resulting HAZOP nodes are fully traceable and reproducible.

Expected JSON shape (all keys optional, tolerant to missing values): 

 {
   "projectName": "Example",
   "installationCode": "AAA",
   "nodes": [
     {
       "nodeId": "Node-01: Inlet separator",
       "tag": "VA-2001",
       "designIntent": "Separate inlet gas and liquid at 60 bara",
       "deviations": [
         {
           "guideWord": "MORE",
           "parameter": "LEVEL",
           "cause": "Liquid outlet valve fails closed",
           "consequence": "Liquid carry-over to compressor",
           "safeguard": "LAHH-2001 trips inlet valve",
           "recommendation": "Verify trip set-point"
         }
       ]
     }
   ]
 }
Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim contributors

      Top-level array keys interpreted as HAZOP nodes.

  • Constructor Details

    • StidHazopDataSource

      public StidHazopDataSource(String json)
      Creates a source from JSON text.
      Parameters:
      json - normalized STID or P&ID-to-HAZOP JSON text

    • StidHazopDataSource

      public StidHazopDataSource(com.google.gson.JsonObject source)
      Creates a source from a JSON object.
      Parameters:
      source - normalized JSON object, or null for an empty source

  • Method Details

    • getProjectName

      public String getProjectName()
      Reads the optional project name.
      Returns:
      project name, or empty string when not present

    • getInstallationCode

      public String getInstallationCode()
      Reads the optional installation code used for traceability.
      Returns:
      installation code, or empty string when not present

    • read

      public List<HAZOPTemplate> read()
      Builds HAZOP node templates from the normalized JSON.
      Returns:
      list of HAZOP node templates, one per node record (never null)

    • buildNode

      private HAZOPTemplate buildNode(com.google.gson.JsonObject record, int index)
      Builds a single HAZOP node template from a node record.
      Parameters:
      record - node JSON object
      index - 1-based node index used for default identifiers
      Returns:
      populated HAZOP node template

    • addDeviation

      private void addDeviation(HAZOPTemplate node, com.google.gson.JsonObject record)
      Adds one deviation row to a node from a deviation record.
      Parameters:
      node - target HAZOP node
      record - deviation JSON object

    • parseGuideWord

      static HAZOPTemplate.GuideWord parseGuideWord(String raw)
      Parses a HAZOP guide-word, tolerant to spacing, case, and underscores.
      Parameters:
      raw - raw guide-word text
      Returns:
      matching guide-word, or null when unrecognized

    • parseParameter

      static HAZOPTemplate.Parameter parseParameter(String raw)
      Parses a HAZOP parameter, tolerant to spacing, case, and underscores.
      Parameters:
      raw - raw parameter text
      Returns:
      matching parameter, or null when unrecognized

    • normalizeToken

      private static String normalizeToken(String raw)
      Normalizes an enum-like token to upper-case with underscores.
      Parameters:
      raw - raw token text
      Returns:
      normalized token, or empty string when null/blank

    • firstArray

      private static com.google.gson.JsonArray firstArray(com.google.gson.JsonObject object, String[] keys)
      Returns the first JSON array present under any of the candidate keys.
      Parameters:
      object - source object
      keys - candidate array keys
      Returns:
      first matching JSON array, or null when none present

    • optString

      private static String optString(com.google.gson.JsonObject object, String key, String fallback)
      Reads an optional string field with a fallback default.
      Parameters:
      object - source object
      key - field key
      fallback - default value when the field is absent or null
      Returns:
      field value, or the fallback
